question: How many patents filed in 2021 by MSAJCE faculty are listed as 'A' applications on the IP India website?
answer:
From the provided data, 5 patents filed by MSAJCE faculty in 2021 are listed as 'A' applications on the IP India website:

• Mr. K. Vairaperumal, "Battery Swapping Smart Station for Future E-Vehicle Transportation" (202141021897 A)
• Mr. Chintala Venkatesh, "A Vehicle Tire Control System at curved roads using intelligent interfaces and support vector machines" (202141025111 A)
• Mrs. D. Hema Sumitha, "Real time based IOT Enabled Smart Metering System" (202141026200 A)
• Mrs. G. Premalatha, Dr. E. Dhiravidachelvi, "Fundamentals of Electrical Measuring Instruments" (202141014294 A)
• Mr. M. Kamarajan, "Deep learning based automatic eye cataract detection algorithm using MATLAB" (202141061583A)

Want to know about any of our faculty's published patents?

evaluation.reason: The response accurately lists the 5 patents filed by MSAJCE faculty in 2021 that are listed as 'A' applications on the IP India website, as per the provided source text.
